archetypes.name: AGGRO — Berserkr
archetypes.win_condition: End matches by round 5-6 via front-loaded dice damage + cheap offensive God Powers.
archetypes.god_powers: Surtr's Flame, Fenrir's Bite, Heimdallr's Watch
archetypes.plays_against: Beats Economy (kills before hoard pays off). Loses to Control.

archetypes.name: CONTROL — Stoðvar
archetypes.win_condition: Survive to turn 8+, outlast via shields, heal, and reflects.
archetypes.god_powers: Aegis of Baldr, Eir's Mercy, Vidar's Reflection
archetypes.plays_against: Beats Aggro (walls + heal outlast rush). Loses to Economy.

archetypes.name: ECONOMY — Gullgjafi
archetypes.win_condition: Hoard tokens through round 5, then drop massive T3 God Power combos.
archetypes.dice_loadout: 3× Miser's Die, 2× Huskarl's Die, 1× Hunter's Die
archetypes.god_powers: Mjölnir's Wrath, Freyja's Blessing, Frigg's Veil
archetypes.runes: Rune of Hoarding, Thief's Rune, Gullveig's Touch
archetypes.plays_against: Beats Control (outscales shields). Loses to Aggro.

archetypes.name: COMBO — Skaldborg
archetypes.win_condition: Build around a specific synergy (e.g., arrow-spam + Skaði's Volley + Storm Rune).
archetypes.god_powers: Skaði's Volley, Njörðr's Tide, Óðinn's Insight
archetypes.runes: Rune of Storms, Skald's Memory, Twin Runes
archetypes.plays_against: Beats Control (pierces defenses with boosted arrows). Loses to Aggro and sometimes Economy (disrupts setup).
